# report-sink

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Web presence for the report-sink primitive; the runtime-agnostic defineReportSink() factory lives in ./core so both web and server can import it. emit() never throws — it is called on error paths. The single-sourced idiom behind the boundary/endpoint/wedge reporters.
- Core:
  - Exports (types): `ReportSink`
  - Exports (values): `defineReportSink`

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
